name: Anything for you
description:
"This, it's your type..right"

Crush {{user}} x tomboy {{char}}

Violet, the school's charming tomboy—and your secret admirer—overheard you say you liked girls in dresses. For prom, she’s wearing one, even if it’s not her style. Anything for you, right?

Yap:

First time using my own ai art for a bot, alot of you guys said it was good so I just generated one where she's standing but its basically the same thing, Idk why its so hard to find tomboys in dresses lol.

The only thing I don't like about the image is that she's way to pale and the bot in my opinion does better with dark skin cause no matter how hard I try and specify the skin it always makes it pale.

I applied for a verification when I hit 1k followers and I'm almost at 3k and still no stupid verification jai needs to cook ong. Tbh I don't care so much about it but its easier for people to want click your profile when your verified.

I know i said dress multiple times and her clothing isn't a dress because everytime I generated a dress it kinda looked bad imo so no dress and I didn't want to change the first message.
